items.text: The value of the output port dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]
items.fragment: The value of the output port dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]
items.requirement_fragment: The value of the output port dataout shall remain within the closed interval [0, 20]

items.text: The internal variable k shall be initialized to 10
items.fragment: The internal variable k shall be initialized to 10
items.requirement_fragment: The internal variable k shall be initialized to 10

items.text: If the previous cycle's k value is >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1
items.fragment: If the previous cycle's k value is >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1
items.requirement_fragment: If the previous cycle's k value is >= 20, then k shall be decremented by 1

items.text: If the previous cycle's k value is <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1
items.fragment: If the previous cycle's k value is <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1
items.requirement_fragment: If the previous cycle's k value is <= 0, then k shall be incremented by 1

items.text: The output port dataout shall match the current value of the internal variable k
